name: Aerobic Pyramid 1.6K
summary: 100-200-300-400… pyramid — aerobic control across distances.

structure.detail: 300 easy mixed swim / kick / drill, building the last 100
Pyramid 100·200·300·400·300·200·100 @ Z2 on 20–30 s rest, hold form on the long ones (repeat if short)
200 easy, long and relaxed

3×400 @ Z2 on 30 s rest — even pace, controlled breathing

summary: Mixed-stroke or race-specific work — variety, strength, and race feel.

10×50 fly (or fly-drill) on 30 s + 4×100 free — build the fourth stroke

name: Backstroke Focus
summary: Mixed-stroke or race-specific work — variety, strength, and race feel.

structure.detail: 400 easy mixed swim / kick / drill, building the last 100
8×100 backstroke @ Z2–3 on 20 s + 4×50 back drill — balance the stroke

summary: Mixed-stroke or race-specific work — variety, strength, and race feel.

8×100 breaststroke @ Z2–3 on 20 s + 4×50 pull-out drill — timing and glide

summary: Mixed-stroke or race-specific work — variety, strength, and race feel.

structure.detail: 400 easy mixed swim / kick / drill, building the last 100
4×100 IM (fly-back-breast-free) on 20 s rest — all-stroke fitness

summary: Mixed-stroke or race-specific work — variety, strength, and race feel.

structure.detail: 400 easy mixed swim / kick / drill, building the last 100
8×50 IM order on 15 s rest — one stroke per 50

name: Descending 100s
summary: Mixed-stroke or race-specific work — variety, strength, and race feel.

structure.detail: 400 easy mixed swim / kick / drill, building the last 100
12×100 in 3 sets of 4, descend each set easy→hard on 15 s rest

name: Kick & Swim Mix
summary: Mixed-stroke or race-specific work — variety, strength, and race feel.

structure.detail: 400 easy mixed swim / kick / drill, building the last 100
8× (100 swim Z2 + 50 kick) on 15 s rest — legs in the aerobic mix

name: Fartlek Swim
summary: Mixed-stroke or race-specific work — variety, strength, and race feel.

structure.detail: 400 easy mixed swim / kick / drill, building the last 100
10×200: alternate 100 easy / 100 @ Z3–4 — feel the gears

name: IM 200 Ladder
summary: Mixed-stroke or race-specific work — variety, strength, and race feel.

2× (200 IM + 4×50 weakest stroke) — round out the strokes

name: Negative-Split 3×400
summary: Mixed-stroke or race-specific work — variety, strength, and race feel.

3×400 on 30 s: second 200 faster than the first — pacing discipline

1500 continuous @ goal tri pace (Z2–3), sight every ~6 strokes

name: Broken Race Sim
summary: Mixed-stroke or race-specific work — variety, strength, and race feel.

3×500 @ goal race pace on 30 s — hold pace as fatigue builds

structure.detail: 400 easy mixed swim / kick / drill, building the last 100
6×200 @ Z2–3, sight every 6 strokes; practice lifting eyes without stalling

name: Open Water — Drafting Practice

structure.detail: 400 easy mixed swim / kick / drill, building the last 100
8×200 @ Z3 on 20 s rest — alternate leading and sitting on the hip/feet

name: Open Water — Fast-Start & Settle

structure.detail: 400 easy mixed swim / kick / drill, building the last 100
6× (fast first 50 Z4 → settle 150 @ Z2–3) — practice the race start

structure.detail: 400 easy mixed swim / kick / drill, building the last 100
1500 continuous @ Z2–3 in wetsuit — feel the buoyancy and adjust the kick

structure.detail: 400 easy mixed swim / kick / drill, building the last 100
10×200 alternating smooth / broken-tempo — adapt stroke to conditions

2000 continuous @ Z2–3 open-water effort, sight regularly, no wall rest

summary: Flush and loosen — all easy, no clock.

8×50 favourite drills on 20 s rest, all easy
400 easy Z1 applying the cues
100 easy, long and relaxed

12×25 max sprint (Z5), full recovery ~30–45 s — quality over fatigue
